_comment: Copy this file to data_sources.json (gitignored) and fill in your private URLs. data_download.py reads data_sources.json.

_format.key: human-readable id, becomes the destination filename if 'dest' is not set
_format.url: direct download URL (HTTP/HTTPS). Google Drive / Dropbox shareable links work if they redirect to the raw file.
_format.dest: (optional) destination path relative to software/vision/data/ — defaults to <key>.<ext>
_format.sha256: (optional) hex digest; if set, downloader verifies the file
